CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Data freshness is more than 24 hours old
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness has breached the 24-hour SLO. Stale data is affecting financial reports.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data pipeline issue immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has breached the 99.9% SLO. Inaccurate financial reports are being generated.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data quality issue immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the 17-25 range
CRITICAL.message: Row count is outside the acceptable bounds of 17-25. Transaction volume is not within expected variance.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the row count anomaly immediately.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute SLO limit. Fresh data may be delayed.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and take action if it exceeds the limit.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% SLO. Financial reports may be slightly inaccurate.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and address the data quality issue at the next business day.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%. Investigate the cause.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the issue with the merchant's data processing.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data. Update the system to handle the new method.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method and update the system as needed.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the 17-25 bounds
INFO.message: Daily row count is near the acceptable bounds of 17-25. Monitor for any anomalies.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the row count and monitor for any further anomalies.
